title: 投资连结保单 ILPs (MAS Notice 307)
summary: ILP 兼具保险与投资,价值随基金浮动,投资风险由保单持有人承担;Notice 307 规范披露/基金/收费,适当性来自 FAA 流程。 / An ILP combines insurance and investment; its value fluctuates with the funds and the policyholder bears the investment risk. Notice 307 governs disclosure/fund/fees; suitability comes from the FAA advisory process.

sections.heading: 本质
sections.body: ILP 保费部分购买基金单位,价值随基金升跌,无资本保证;另有保险保障成分,投资风险由保单持有人承担。

sections.heading: Nature
sections.body: Part of the premium buys fund units; value rises/falls with the funds with no capital guarantee; there is an insurance component and the policyholder bears the investment risk.

sections.heading: 披露与适当性
sections.body: Notice 307 要求披露产品摘要/基金信息/费用/风险,设 free-look;"合理基础适当性"属 FAA 咨询流程(FAA-N16)。

sections.heading: Disclosure & suitability
sections.body: Notice 307 requires disclosure of product summary/fund info/fees/risks and a free-look period; reasonable-basis suitability comes from the FAA advisory process (FAA-N16).

keyPoints: 投资风险由保单持有人承担 / Policyholder bears the investment risk
无资本保证 / No capital guarantee
设 free-look 冷静期 / Free-look period applies
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 (ILP disclosure/fund/fee); suitability per FAA advisory process (FAA-N16 / reasonable basis)
